attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT                  		BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT, 
    SMXSS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, 
	COALESCE(SPMT.REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                  			NOVALID_SLSACCTGRP_PTYRSN_NAME,
	COALESCE(SPMT.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,'=')              		OWNED_FLG,
	COALESCE(SPMT.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,'UNKNOWN')           	HQ_REMOTE_CD,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,'MANUAL')        		ENRCHMT_CUST_TYPE_CD,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,'UNKNOWN')     	ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS     ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD  ,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')      		VALIDATION_MODE_CD,
	COALESCE((SPMT.SPLIT_PERCENT*100),0)         		END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
	SPMT.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID           			SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTN_ID_INT,	
	SPMT.VALIDATION_DATE          			         LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
	COALESCE(SPMT.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')           		VALIDATION_STATUS_CD, 
	COALESCE(NES.ERP_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')                 	LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,
	 NPS.PARTY_KEY     					SALES_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PTY_KEY,
	 NP.PARTY_KEY                      			FLD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PTY_KEY,
	 NPSV.PARTY_KEY     					SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,
	 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  							EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER  							EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	TRUNC(SPMT.START_DATE)       START_TV_DT,
    COALESCE(SPMT.EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  END_TV_DTM,
   SPMT.UCRM_CASE_NUM AS UCRM_CASE_NUM, /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/
	SPMT.ACTION_CD						ACTION_CODE,
	'I'							DML_TYPE
	

FROM 
    $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX_XAAS SPMT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OTM_MANUAL_TRX_XAAS  OMTX
ON SPMT.ORDER_LINE_ID=OMTX.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SPMT.TRX_ORIG_CODE=OMTX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT  SMXSS
ON OMTX.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
	ON SPMT.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID=NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
	
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPS
	ON SPMT.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID=NPS.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NPS.SS_CODE='CR'
	
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
	ON SPMT.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
	AND NPSV.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NES
	ON SPMT.USER_NAME=NES.ERP_USER_NAME
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_LINK_BIZ BIZV
        ON SPMT.SAV_MEMBER_ID =BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT
    LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_NO_VLD_SA_GRP_PTY_RSN_BIZKEY NNVSGPRB 
	ON SPMT.REASON_CODE = NNVSGPRB.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,START_TV_DT,ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD ORDER BY END_TV_DTM DESC)=1

SELECT
ACTION_CD ,                    
ASSIGNMENT_CODE,               
ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
BATCH_ID,                      
CREATE_DATETIME ,              
CREATION_DATE  ,               
ENRICHMENT_CODE,               
ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE, 
EXPIRATION_DATE,               
HZ_CR_PARTY_ID,                
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
ORDER_LINE_ID,                 
REASON_CODE,                   
SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,            
SAV_ID  ,                      
SAV_MEMBER_ID , 
SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,               
SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
START_DATE,                    
SPMT.STATUS_CODE,                   
TRX_ORIG_CODE,                 
TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,              
TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,               
USER_NAME,
VALIDATION_DATE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
UCRM_CASE_NUM /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/
FROM  
 $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX_XAAS   SPMT
 WHERE (NOT EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
	WHERE SPMT.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID=NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NP.SS_CODE='CR' )
 OR NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPS
	WHERE SPMT.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID=NPS.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NPS.SS_CODE='CR')
 OR NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
	WHERE SPMT.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
	AND NPSV.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01')
 OR NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NES
	WHERE SPMT.USER_NAME=NES.ERP_USER_NAME)
 OR NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_LINK_BIZ BIZV
        WHERE SPMT.SAV_MEMBER_ID =BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT))
 AND EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_MANUAL_TRX_XAAS  OMTX,
$$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT SMXSS
WHERE   SPMT.ORDER_LINE_ID=OMTX.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SPMT.TRX_ORIG_CODE=OMTX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
AND  OMTX.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT)

SELECT
EX.ACTION_CD,                     
EX.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,               
EX.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
EX.BATCH_ID,                      
EX.CREATE_DATETIME,               
EX.CREATION_DATE,                 
EX.ENRICHMENT_CODE,               
EX.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,         
EX.EXPIRATION_DATE,               
EX.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID,                
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
EX.ORDER_LINE_ID,                 
EX.REASON_CODE,                   
EX.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,            
EX.SAV_ID,                        
EX.SAV_MEMBER_ID,   
EX.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,              
EX.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
EX.SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
EX.START_DATE,                    
EX.STATUS_CODE,                   
EX.TRX_ORIG_CODE,                 
EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,              
EX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,               
EX.USER_NAME,
EX.VALIDATION_DATE,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM    /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/
   
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_XAAS  EX                
WHERE EX.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX_XAAS   STG
WHERE STG.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID=EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID)
